Our flavours

Three delicious reasons to treat yourself

Luxury Lemon

Tangy lemon curd layered with creamy cheesecake filling and a buttery shortbread base.

Contains: Milk, Wheat (Gluten), Egg, Sulphites

Lotus Biscoff

Smooth vanilla cheesecake layered with Lotus Biscoff spread and topped with crumbled Biscoff biscuit.

Contains: Milk, Wheat (Gluten), Soya

Raspberry & White Chocolate

Sweet raspberry jam layered with creamy cheesecake and finished with shortbread and white chocolate.

Contains: Milk, Wheat (Gluten), Soya

Meet the maker

Hi, I'm Amy

Founder of The Cheesecake Tub Co. Every cheesecake tub is handmade in Hull in small batches using quality ingredients and plenty of care.

As someone who lives with severe food allergies myself, I understand how important clear allergen awareness is.

Large orders

Celebrating something special?

Perfect for birthdays, parties, gifts, workplace treats and events. Custom quotes are available for larger orders.

Ask about large orders

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Where do I collect from?

Collection is from Hull. Full details will be provided once your order is confirmed.

How do I pay?

Bank transfer is preferred. Cash may be accepted on collection for single tub orders.

How long do they last?

They are best enjoyed within 3 days and must be kept refrigerated.

How do I order?

Send a DM on Instagram with your flavour choice and quantity.

What about allergies?

Please contact us before ordering if you have allergies. Allergen information is provided for each flavour.

Luxury handcrafted cheesecake tubs made fresh in Hull.
